title: No mobs variants
description: A texture pack that makes the new mob variants for chickens, cows and pigs look like the temperate variant.
body:
# **Description**
A texture pack that makes the new mob variants for chickens, cows and pigs look like the temperate variant.



<details>
<summary>Versions</summary>



Minecraft java:
- **1.21.5**
- **1.21.6**
- **1.21.7**
- **1.21.8**
- **1.21.9**
- **1.21.10**
- **1.21.11**

</details>


![The warm variant of every animal with this resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/978ca1b48ea795860fef86aedf9744dcd78daa02_0.webp)



Legal:
> This resource pack uses textures from [Mojang](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/usage-guidelines)
> 
> This resource pack is not approved by or associated with Mojang or Microsoft.



Contact:
> I prefer people downloading my resource pack from Modrinth, however if you want to contact me, please write a comment on Curseforge.
